subcodes.first_line: Thy call hath been heard, and the fragrances of thy love have been inhaled. Verily thy Lord, He is the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing. Thou must with utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت شنیده شد و نفحات محبتت استشمام گشت ان ربک لهو السمیع البصیر باید بکمال
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @transcending the material condition, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
